steps.title: Test the choices in each equation
steps.content: Substitute each candidate into $y=3x+13$ and $y=3x^2+13$. For $(0,13)$: $3(0)+13=13$ and $3(0)^2+13=13$, so both equations hold.

steps.title: Identify the matching pair
steps.content: Only $(0,13)$ satisfies both equations simultaneously. That matches choice B — B is correct.
